author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone Vote for Star Atlas in the Gam3 Awards!

Our community isn't the only one being nominated for awards, so is Star Atlas itself! Please take a few minutes to click the link below and vote for us.  

Star Atlas has been nominated for 2 different Gam3 Awards categories:

• Best Graphics
• Most Anticipated Game

 | Vote for us: https://polkastarter.gg/gam3awards/
